calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-09-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Final Approval Of Settlement; For Attorneys Fees And Costs; For Enhancement Awards; Reimbursement Of Settlement Adminstration Costs
Off Calendar Dec-05-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ryan Hicks of Hoyer & Hicks telephone number 415-766-3536 for all plaintiffs and class.
Malcolm Heinicke of Munger, Tolles & Olson LLP telephone number 415-512-4029 appeared by telephone for Defendants EAT24, LLC and Yelp Inc.

Mr. Hicks stated that service was made on the Labor and Workforce Developement Agency. PLAINTIFFS CHRISTOPHER JAVIER, AMBER JOHNSON, SANDY MANU'S AND ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED Motion For Final Approval Of Settlement; For Attorneys Fees And Costs; For Enhancement Awards; Reimbursement Of Settlement Adminstration Costs is granted with fees at thirty percent of the net. Order and a separate judgment signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

Final Approval Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-14-2016 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Final Approval Of Settlement; For Attorneys Fees And Costs; For Enhancement Awards; Reimbursement Of Settlement Adminstration Costs
Off Calendar Nov-14-2016 Continued To Dec-05-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ryan Hicks of Hoyer & Hicks telephone number 415-766-3536 for Plaintiffs.
Malcolm Heinicke of Munger, Tolles & Olson LLP telephone number 415-512-4029 appeared by telephone for Defendants EAT2, LLC and Yelp Inc.

Mr. Hicks addressed the Court's concerns regarding notice to the Labor and Workforce Development Agency ("LWDA"), the amount of fees and inquiry as to the amount of payment to the class members. Upon conclusion, PLAINTIFFS CHRISTOPHER JAVIER, AMBER JOHNSON AND SANDY MANU'S Motion For Final Approval Of Settlement; For Attorneys Fees And Costs; For Enhancement Awards; Reimbursement Of Settlement Adminstration Costs is continued to December 5, 2016 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302 for notice to be provided to the LWDA. Mr. Hicks is to file an amended notice of hearing with a proof of service. The Court noted that no one came forward to object and stated that there is no need to provide notice to the class members. The Court also informed Counsel that it will approve 30% of the net after costs. Mr. Hicks is to reduce the amount by his costs and the amount paid to the third party vendor. Mr. Hicks is to prepare a form of order that reflects the fee modification and present it for the December 5th hearing.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-30-2016 Continued To Dec-28-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice And Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Settlement
Off Calendar Jun-27-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. RYAN L. HICKS OF THE HOYER & HICKS, TEL. NO. 1-415-766-3536 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFFS;
ATTY. MALCOLM A. HEINICKE OF THE MUNGER TOLLES & OLSON LLP, TEL. NO. 1-415-512-4029 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT YELP.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSSED REGARDING PAGA CLAIMS AND FEES. THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFFS CHRISTOPHER JAVIER, AMBER JOHNSON AND SANDY MANU'S Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Settlement is Granted. The Final Approval Hearing is set for November 14, 2016. The Class Members may be heard orally in support of or in opposition to the settlement regardless of whether they have timely submitted an objection. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/hk
